hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[PRE-COMMIT CHECKLIST] Before committing, verify all 4 steps are complete: (1) README updated (2) Tests updated (3) CLAUDE.md updated (4) apps/docs updated. Stop and complete any missing steps first."}}'

staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged" | grep -q 'apps/docs/content/'; then missing=''; echo "$staged" | grep -q 'apps/docs/public/llms.txt' || missing="$missing llms.txt"; echo "$staged" | grep -q 'AGENTS.md' || missing="$missing AGENTS.md"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[LLM DOCS ALERT] apps/docs/content changed but these LLM docs are NOT staged:%s — update them before committing."}}' "$missing"; fi; fi

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[PUSH GUARD] git push requires explicit user confirmation. Do NOT push unless the user has explicitly asked to push or create a PR in this message."}}'

cs=$(find .changeset -name '*.md' ! -name 'README.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$cs" -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"[CHANGESET REMINDER] No pending changeset found. Ask the user whether a version bump is needed (minor for new features, patch for bug fixes, major for breaking changes) before opening the PR."}}'; fi
